name: build_defensive_wall
description: Build a defensive wall/trench using oak planks to create cover from hostiles
parameters: z.object({blockType: z.string().describe('The block type to use, e.g. oak_planks'), config: z.object({count: z.number().describe('Approximate maximum number of blocks to place'), position: z.object({x: z.number().describe('Starting X coordinate'), y: z.number().describe('Starting Y coordinate'), z: z.number().describe('Fixed Z coordinate')}).describe('Position to start building the line structure from'), structureType: z.enum(['trench', 'wall']).describe('trench for 1-high, wall for 2-high structure')}).describe('Configuration for the defensive structure')})
code: const totalAvailable = bot.inventory.items().filter(i => i.name === args.blockType).reduce((acc, i) => acc + i.count, 0); if (totalAvailable < args.config.count) { return `<NO ITEMS>: Only ${totalAvailable} ${args.blockType} available, need ${args.config.count}`; } const movements = new Movements(bot); bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); const startPos = new Vec3(Math.floor(args.config.position.x), Math.floor(args.config.position.y), Math.floor(args.config.position.z)); await bot.pathfinder.goto(new goals.GoalNear(startPos.x, startPos.y + 1, startPos.z, 2)); const height = args.config.structureType === 'trench' ? 1 : 2; const length = Math.ceil(args.config.count / height); const baseY = Math.floor(args.config.position.y) + 1; const startX = Math.floor(args.config.position.x); const startZ = Math.floor(args.config.position.z); let placed = 0; const getItem = () => bot.inventory.findInventoryItem(args.blockType, false); for (let i = 0; i < length && placed < args.config.count; i++) { for (let h = 0; h < height && placed < args.config.count; h++) { const targetPos = new Vec3(startX + i, baseY + h, startZ); const targetBlock = bot.blockAt(targetPos); if (targetBlock.name !== 'air') continue; if (!bot.heldItem || bot.heldItem.name !== args.blockType) { const item = getItem(); if (!item) break; await bot.equip(item, 'hand'); } const faceVectors = [new Vec3(0, 1, 0), new Vec3(0, -1, 0), new Vec3(1, 0, 0), new Vec3(-1, 0, 0), new Vec3(0, 0, 1), new Vec3(0, 0, -1)]; let success = false; for (let fv of faceVectors) { const refPos = targetPos.minus(fv); const refBlock = bot.blockAt(refPos); if (refBlock && refBlock.name !== 'air' && refBlock.boundingBox !== 'empty') { await bot.pathfinder.goto(new goals.GoalNear(targetPos.x, targetPos.y, targetPos.z, 2)); try { await bot.placeBlock(refBlock, fv); placed++; success = true; break; } catch (err) {} } } if (success) {} } } return `<BUILT ${args.config.structureType.toUpperCase()}>: Placed ${placed}/${args.config.count} ${args.blockType} blocks`;

name: build_defensive_structure
description: Build a defensive wall or trench at specified coordinates using available planks and materials
parameters: z.object({position: z.object({x: z.number().describe('X coordinate of the base (starting) block'),y: z.number().describe('Y coordinate of the base'),z: z.number().describe('Z coordinate of the base block')}).describe('Position of the bottom-front-left corner of the defensive wall (wall extends +Z)'),options: z.object({height: z.number().min(1).max(10).describe('Height of the wall'),length: z.number().min(1).max(20).optional().describe('Length along Z axis; defaults to 5'),material: z.string().describe('Block ID like oak_planks')}).describe('Defensive wall options')})
code: const startPos = new Vec3(Math.floor(args.position.x), Math.floor(args.position.y), Math.floor(args.position.z)); const height = args.options.height; const length = args.options.length ?? 5; const material = args.options.material; let totalAvail = bot.inventory.items().reduce((sum, item) => item.name === material ? sum + item.count : sum, 0); const needed = length * height; if (totalAvail < needed) { return `<INSUFFICIENT>: Need ${needed} ${material}, have ${totalAvail}.`; } const movements = new Movements(bot); bot.pathfinder.setMovements(movements); await bot.pathfinder.goto(new goals.GoalNear(startPos.x, startPos.y + 1, startPos.z + Math.floor(length / 2), 3)); let builtCount = 0; for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < height; j++) { const targetPos = startPos.plus(new Vec3(0, j, i)); const block = bot.blockAt(targetPos); if (block.boundingBox === 'empty') { let refBlock = bot.blockAt(targetPos.offset(0, -1, 0)); let faceVec = new Vec3(0, 1, 0); if (refBlock.boundingBox === 'empty') { refBlock = bot.blockAt(targetPos.offset(-1, 0, 0)); faceVec = new Vec3(1, 0, 0); } if (refBlock.boundingBox !== 'empty') { try { await bot.placeBlock(refBlock, faceVec); builtCount++; } catch (err) { } } } } } bot.pathfinder.setGoal(null); return `<BUILT>: Defensive wall ${length} x ${height} (${builtCount}/${needed} blocks).`;
